TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Seediq Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://trv.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_trv, title = {Seediq Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://trv.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: = Lidaw = Gaga mniq Hwareyseyn Ciansyang ka alang Lidaw. 1,118 sapah ka kneegu na sapah, 2,835 hiyi ka kana knhbragan na hiyi. Tnpusu seejiq o mangal 32% niqan 899 hiyi sp, rahuq na uxay tnpusu seejiq o mangal 68% niqan 1,936 hiyi koia. Kana ka kleegan seejiq ga, Amis 29%, Truku 1%, ni rahuq na o 1%. Pnyahan pnatas
S.PHON: = lidaw = gaga mniq ħwaɾəsən ʦiansjaŋ ka alaŋ lidaw. *,*** sapaħ ka knəəgu na sapaħ, *,*** ħiji ka kana knħbɾagan na ħiji. tnpusu səəɟiq o maŋal **% niqan *** ħiji sp, ɾaħuq na uxaj tnpusu səəɟiq o maŋal **% niqan *,*** ħiji koia. kana ka kləəgan səəɟiq ga, amis **%, tɾuku *%, ni ɾaħuq na o *%. pnjaħan pnatas
S.FORM: = Lidaw = Gaga mniq Hwareyseyn Ciansyang ka alang Lidaw. 1,118 sapah ka kneegu na sapah, 2,835 hiyi ka kana knhbragan na hiyi. Tnpusu seejiq o mangal 32% niqan 899 hiyi sp, rahuq na uxay tnpusu seejiq o mangal 68% niqan 1,936 hiyi koia. Kana ka kleegan seejiq ga, Amis 29%, Truku 1%, ni rahuq na o 1%. Pnyahan pnatas
S.PHON: = lidaw = gaga mniq ħwaɾəsən ʦiansjaŋ ka alaŋ lidaw. *,*** sapaħ ka knəəgu na sapaħ, *,*** ħiji ka kana knħbɾagan na ħiji. tnpusu səəɟiq o maŋal **% niqan *** ħiji sp, ɾaħuq na uxaj tnpusu səəɟiq o maŋal **% niqan *,*** ħiji koia. kana ka kləəgan səəɟiq ga, amis **%, tɾuku *%, ni ɾaħuq na o *%. pnjaħan pnatas
